name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – Jul 2019
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Keep an eye out for monthly Product Updates! It’s our way of keeping you in the loop about the newest features and product improvements."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"\nNEW FEATURES AND UPDATES"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Automatically Add SMS Contact to Your List","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The days of manually adding SMS contacts are gone! SMS contact information can now be automatically added from the same opt-in forms that users are filling in for email, using the SMS API. Previously, Maropost users needed to manually import SMS contacts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"No more mistakes – send your A/B campaigns at the right time ","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Clicking “Send Now” for your A/B campaign sends it out immediately, even if you’ve scheduled it for a specific date and time. The new warning message makes sure that you’re sending out the right campaign at the right time. "}]}]
